parameters.command: =if [ -z '{{$json.attachment_b64}}' ]; then echo "ERROR: No se encontró adjunto Excel en el correo"; exit 1; fi && mkdir -p "/data/cases/{{$json.case_id}}/01_originales" "/data/cases/{{$json.case_id}}/02_json" && printf '%s' '{{$json.attachment_b64}}' | base64 -d > "/data/cases/{{$json.case_id}}/01_originales/cuestionario.xlsx" && python /data/scripts/parse_ingesta_n8n.py parse-questionnaire --input "/data/cases/{{$json.case_id}}/01_originales/cuestionario.xlsx" --outdir "/data/cases/{{$json.case_id}}/02_json" --case-id "{{$json.case_id}}"

=case_id="{{$json.case_id}}"

if [ -z "$case_id" ] || [ "$case_id" = "undefined" ] || [ "$case_id" = "null" ]; then
  printf '{"case_id":"","status":"ERROR","error":"case_id vacío antes de comprobar triaje/cuestionario","triaje_exists":false,"questionnaire_exists":false}\n'
  exit 1
fi

base="/data/cases/$case_id"
state_dir="$base/00_state"

mkdir -p "$state_dir"

triaje="$base/02_json/triaje.json"
questionnaire="$base/02_json/questionnaire.json"
lock="$state_dir/tier_started.lock"

if [ -f "$triaje" ] && [ -f "$questionnaire" ]; then
  if [ -f "$lock" ]; then
    status="ALREADY_STARTED"
  else
    date -Iseconds > "$lock"
    status="COMPLETE"
  fi
else
  status="PENDING"
fi

printf '{"case_id":"%s","status":"%s","triaje_exists":%s,"questionnaire_exists":%s,"triaje_path":"%s","questionnaire_path":"%s"}\n' \
  "$case_id" \
  "$status" \
  "$([ -f "$triaje" ] && echo true || echo false)" \
  "$([ -f "$questionnaire" ] && echo true || echo false)" \
  "$triaje" \
  "$questionnaire"

=case_id="{{$json.case_id}}"

if [ -z "$case_id" ] || [ "$case_id" = "undefined" ] || [ "$case_id" = "null" ]; then
  printf '{"case_id":"","status":"ERROR","error":"case_id vacío antes de comprobar triaje/cuestionario","triaje_exists":false,"questionnaire_exists":false}\n'
  exit 1
fi

base="/data/cases/$case_id"
state_dir="$base/00_state"

mkdir -p "$state_dir"

triaje="$base/02_json/triaje.json"
questionnaire="$base/02_json/questionnaire.json"
lock="$state_dir/tier_started.lock"

if [ -f "$triaje" ] && [ -f "$questionnaire" ]; then
  if [ -f "$lock" ]; then
    status="ALREADY_STARTED"
  else
    date -Iseconds > "$lock"
    status="COMPLETE"
  fi
else
  status="PENDING"
fi

printf '{"case_id":"%s","status":"%s","triaje_exists":%s,"questionnaire_exists":%s,"triaje_path":"%s","questionnaire_path":"%s"}\n' \
  "$case_id" \
  "$status" \
  "$([ -f "$triaje" ] && echo true || echo false)" \
  "$([ -f "$questionnaire" ] && echo true || echo false)" \
  "$triaje" \
  "$questionnaire"

=/usr/bin/python3 - <<'PY'
import json
import base64
import re
from pathlib import Path
from datetime import datetime

case_id = {{ JSON.stringify($json.case_id) }}
email_subject_b64 = {{ JSON.stringify($json.email_subject_b64) }}
email_body_b64 = {{ JSON.stringify($json.email_body_b64) }}
from_email = {{ JSON.stringify($json.from_email) }}
received_at = {{ JSON.stringify($json.received_at) }}

if not case_id:
    raise Exception(
        "No se ha podido extraer case_id del asunto del correo. "
        "El asunto debe contener [Follow-up] Codigo_del_proyecto."
    )

subject = base64.b64decode(email_subject_b64.encode("ascii")).decode("utf-8")
body = base64.b64decode(email_body_b64.encode("ascii")).decode("utf-8")


def clean_provider_reply(text):
    text = str(text or "")
    text = text.replace("\r\n", "\n").replace("\r", "\n")

    # Marcadores robustos del inicio del mensaje citado/original.
    # IMPORTANTE: no usamos marcadores genéricos como "\nEl " porque cortan respuestas tipo:
    # "El control está implantado..."
    marker_patterns = [
        r"(?im)^\s*-{2,}\s*Mensaje original\s*-{2,}\s*$",
        r"(?im)^\s*-{2,}\s*Original Message\s*-{2,}\s*$",
        r"(?im)^\s*De:\s+.+$",
        r"(?im)^\s*From:\s+.+$",
        r"(?im)^\s*Enviado el:\s+.+$",
        r"(?im)^\s*Sent:\s+.+$",
        r"(?im)^\s*Para:\s+.+$",
        r"(?im)^\s*To:\s+.+$",
        r"(?im)^\s*Asunto:\s+.+$",
        r"(?im)^\s*Subject:\s+.+$",
        r"(?im)^\s*El .+ escribió:\s*$",
        r"(?im)^\s*On .+ wrote:\s*$",
        r"(?im)^\s*_{5,}\s*$",
        r"(?im)^\s*---\s*$",
        r"(?im)^\s*This email was sent automatically with n8n.*$"
    ]

    cut_positions = []

    for pattern in marker_patterns:
        match = re.search(pattern, text)
        if match and match.start() > 0:
            cut_positions.append(match.start())

    if cut_positions:
        text = text[:min(cut_positions)]

    # Quitamos líneas citadas típicas con ">"
    clean_lines = []

    for line in text.split("\n"):
        if re.match(r"^\s*>", line):
            continue

        clean_lines.append(line.rstrip())

    text = "\n".join(clean_lines)

    # Quitamos firmas típicas.
    text = re.sub(r"\n--\s*\n.*$", "", text, flags=re.S)
    text = re.sub(r"\n-{2,}\s*$", "", text, flags=re.S)

    # Normalizamos saltos.
    text = re.sub(r"\n{3,}", "\n\n", text)

    return text.strip()


def normalize_qid(value):
    raw = str(value or "").upper()
    match = re.search(r"\d{1,3}", raw)

    if not match:
        return ""

    return f"Q_{int(match.group(0)):03d}"


def parse_answers_by_question(clean_text):
    """
    Extrae bloques tipo:

    Q_019
    respuesta...

    Q_023: respuesta...

    También acepta:
    Q019
    Q-019
    Q 019
    """

    text = str(clean_text or "").replace("\r\n", "\n").replace("\r", "\n")

    pattern = re.compile(
        r"^\s*(Q[\s_\-]?\d{1,3})\s*[:\-–—.]?\s*(.*)$",
        re.IGNORECASE | re.MULTILINE
    )

    matches = []

    for match in pattern.finditer(text):
        qid = normalize_qid(match.group(1))
        inline = (match.group(2) or "").strip()

        if not qid:
            continue

        matches.append({
            "qid": qid,
            "start": match.start(),
            "end": match.end(),
            "inline": inline
        })

    answers = {}

    if not matches:
        return answers

    for i, match in enumerate(matches):
        qid = match["qid"]
        start = match["end"]
        end = matches[i + 1]["start"] if i + 1 < len(matches) else len(text)

        block_parts = []

        if match["inline"]:
            block_parts.append(match["inline"])

        remaining_block = text[start:end].strip()

        if remaining_block:
            block_parts.append(remaining_block)

        block = "\n".join(block_parts)
        block = block.strip(" \n\r\t:-–—.")

        # Defensa extra por si se ha colado parte del correo original.
        original_request_signals = [
            "Aclaración requerida",
            "Aclaracion requerida",
            "Motivo:",
            "Pregunta:",
            "Durante el análisis del cuestionario",
            "Durante el analisis del cuestionario",
            "Por favor, responded manteniendo",
            "This email was sent automatically with n8n"
        ]

        # Si el bloque parece ser únicamente el bloque original de solicitud, lo descartamos.
        block_lower = block.lower()
        has_original_signals = any(signal.lower() in block_lower for signal in original_request_signals)

        provider_signals = [
            "confirmamos",
            "se dispone",
            "se almacenan",
            "se cifra",
            "se cifran",
            "actualmente",
            "no existe",
            "no disponemos",
            "está implantado",
            "esta implantado",
            "se realiza",
            "se encuentran",
            "únicamente",
            "unicamente",
            "tls",
            "aes",
            "bcrypt",
            "rto",
            "rpo",
            "retención",
            "retencion",
            "backup",
            "copias de seguridad"
        ]

        has_provider_signals = any(signal.lower() in block_lower for signal in provider_signals)

        if has_original_signals and not has_provider_signals:
            continue

        if block:
            answers[qid] = block.strip()

    return answers


clean_body = clean_provider_reply(body)
answers = parse_answers_by_question(clean_body)

base = Path("/data/cases") / case_id
analysis_dir = base / "03_analysis"
followup_dir = base / "04_followups" / "round_001"

analysis_dir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
followup_dir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)

raw_file = followup_dir / "provider_response_raw.txt"
clean_file = followup_dir / "provider_response_clean.txt"
parsed_file = followup_dir / "provider_response_parsed.json"

raw_file.write_text(body, encoding="utf-8")
clean_file.write_text(clean_body, encoding="utf-8")

parsed = {
    "case_id": case_id,
    "followup_round": 1,
    "from_email": from_email,
    "received_at": received_at,
    "subject": subject,
    "raw_response_file": str(raw_file),
    "clean_response_file": str(clean_file),
    "answers_by_question": answers,
    "answers_detected": list(answers.keys()),
    "answers_count": len(answers),
    "full_clean_response": clean_body,
    "full_raw_response": body,
    "parse_warning": "" if answers else "No se detectaron respuestas por Q_XXX en la parte limpia del correo."
}

parsed_file.write_text(
    json.dumps(parsed, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2),
    encoding="utf-8"
)

print(json.dumps({
    "case_id": case_id,
    "followup_round": 1,
    "provider_response_file": str(raw_file),
    "provider_response_clean_file": str(clean_file),
    "provider_response_parsed_file": str(parsed_file),
    "answers_detected": list(answers.keys()),
    "answers_count": len(answers),
    "parse_warning": parsed["parse_warning"]
}, ensure_ascii=False))
PY

=mkdir -p "/data/cases/{{$json.case_id}}/03_analysis/followup_reanalysis_results" && printf '%s' '{{$json.followup_reanalysis_b64}}' | base64 -d > "/data/cases/{{$json.case_id}}/03_analysis/followup_reanalysis_results/{{$json.batch_id}}.json" && python - <<'PY'
import json
from pathlib import Path

case_id = "{{$json.case_id}}"
batch_id = "{{$json.batch_id}}"

path = Path(f"/data/cases/{case_id}/03_analysis/followup_reanalysis_results/{batch_id}.json")

data = json.loads(path.read_text(encoding="utf-8"))

evaluations = data.get("question_evaluations", [])

if not evaluations:
    raise Exception(f"ERROR: Se ha intentado guardar un reanálisis vacío en {path}. Se detiene el flujo.")

print(json.dumps({
    "case_id": case_id,
    "batch_id": batch_id,
    "saved_path": str(path),
    "question_evaluations_saved": len(evaluations),
    "question_ids_saved": [ev.get("question_id") for ev in evaluations]
}, ensure_ascii=False))
PY

=python - <<'PY'
import json
from pathlib import Path
from datetime import datetime
from collections import defaultdict

def load_json(path):
    return json.loads(path.read_text(encoding="utf-8"))

def write_json(path, data):
    path.write_text(
        json.dumps(data, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2),
        encoding="utf-8"
    )

def discover_case_id():
    root = Path("/data/cases")
    candidates = []

    if not root.exists():
        return ""

    for case_dir in root.iterdir():
        if not case_dir.is_dir():
            continue

        reanalysis_dir = case_dir / "03_analysis" / "followup_reanalysis_results"
        scoring_path = case_dir / "03_analysis" / "scoring_preliminary.json"

        files = list(reanalysis_dir.glob("*.json"))

        if files:
            latest = max(p.stat().st_mtime for p in files)
            candidates.append((latest, case_dir.name))
        elif scoring_path.exists():
            candidates.append((scoring_path.stat().st_mtime, case_dir.name))

    if not candidates:
        return ""

    candidates.sort(reverse=True)
    return candidates[0][1]

case_id = "{{$json.case_id}}".strip()

if not case_id:
    case_id = discover_case_id()

if not case_id:
    raise Exception("No se pudo determinar case_id para generar análisis final.")

base = Path("/data/cases") / case_id
analysis_dir = base / "03_analysis"
reanalysis_dir = analysis_dir / "followup_reanalysis_results"

preliminary_path = analysis_dir / "scoring_preliminary.json"

if not preliminary_path.exists():
    raise Exception(f"No existe {preliminary_path}")

preliminary = load_json(preliminary_path)

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# 1. Leer de forma robusta los resultados del follow-up
# ------------------------------------------------------------

updates = {}
reanalysis_files_read = []
reanalysis_files_found = []

if reanalysis_dir.exists():
    reanalysis_files_found = sorted(reanalysis_dir.glob("*.json"))

for path in reanalysis_files_found:
    try:
        data = load_json(path)
    except Exception as e:
        continue

    reanalysis_files_read.append(str(path))

    # Soportamos varias estructuras posibles.
    if isinstance(data.get("question_evaluations"), list):
        evaluations = data.get("question_evaluations", [])
    elif isinstance(data.get("followup_reanalysis", {}).get("question_evaluations"), list):
        evaluations = data.get("followup_reanalysis", {}).get("question_evaluations", [])
    elif isinstance(data.get("scoring_batch", {}).get("question_evaluations"), list):
        evaluations = data.get("scoring_batch", {}).get("question_evaluations", [])
    else:
        evaluations = []

    for ev in evaluations:
        qid = str(ev.get("question_id", "")).strip().upper()

        if not qid:
            continue

        try:
            final_score = int(ev.get("final_score"))
        except Exception:
            try:
                final_score = int(ev.get("score"))
            except Exception:
                final_score = 1

        if final_score not in [1, 3]:
            final_score = 1

        updates[qid] = {
            "question_id": qid,
            "final_score": final_score,
            "final_score_type": "compliant" if final_score == 3 else "non_compliance",
            "answer_summary": ev.get("answer_summary", ""),
            "decision_reason": ev.get("decision_reason", ""),
            "resolved_by_provider": final_score == 3,
            "source_reanalysis_file": path.name
        }

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# 2. Aplicar updates sobre scoring_preliminary
# ------------------------------------------------------------

final_evaluations = []
warnings = []

for ev in preliminary.get("question_evaluations", []):
    qid = str(ev.get("question_id", "")).strip().upper()
    final_ev = dict(ev)

    update = updates.get(qid)

    if update:
        final_score = int(update["final_score"])

        final_ev["followup_resolution"] = {
            "followup_round": 1,
            "resolved_by_provider": update["resolved_by_provider"],
            "answer_summary": update.get("answer_summary", ""),
            "decision_reason": update.get("decision_reason", ""),
            "source_reanalysis_file": update.get("source_reanalysis_file", "")
        }

        if final_score == 3:
            final_ev["score"] = 3
            final_ev["score_type"] = "compliant"
            final_ev["answer_summary"] = update.get("answer_summary", "") or final_ev.get("answer_summary", "")
            final_ev["decision_reason"] = update.get("decision_reason", "") or final_ev.get("decision_reason", "")
            final_ev["generates_finding"] = False
            final_ev["requires_provider_followup"] = False
            final_ev["requires_human_review"] = False
            final_ev["followup_questions"] = []
            final_ev["level"] = "SIN RIESGO"
            final_ev["risk_id"] = ""
            final_ev["risk_name"] = ""
            final_ev["control_ids"] = []
            final_ev["incumplimiento_identificado"] = ""
            final_ev["controles_asociados"] = ""
            final_ev["amenazas"] = []
            final_ev["mitigation"] = ""
            final_ev["mitigation_guide"] = ""
            final_ev["report_context_example"] = ""
            final_ev["report_detail_example"] = ""
            final_ev["tiempo_mitigacion"] = ""

        else:
            final_ev["score"] = 1
            final_ev["score_type"] = "non_compliance"
            final_ev["answer_summary"] = update.get("answer_summary", "") or final_ev.get("answer_summary", "")
            final_ev["decision_reason"] = update.get("decision_reason", "") or final_ev.get("decision_reason", "")
            final_ev["generates_finding"] = True
            final_ev["requires_provider_followup"] = False
            final_ev["requires_human_review"] = False
            final_ev["followup_questions"] = []

    else:
        # Si no hay update, mantenemos la evaluación previa.
        try:
            score = int(final_ev.get("score"))
        except Exception:
            score = 2

        # Regla máximo 1 ronda:
        # si alguna pregunta sigue score 2 y NO hay update, se convierte a score 1.
        if score == 2:
            final_ev["score"] = 1
            final_ev["score_type"] = "non_compliance"
            final_ev["generates_finding"] = True
            final_ev["requires_provider_followup"] = False
            final_ev["requires_human_review"] = False
            final_ev["followup_questions"] = []
            final_ev["followup_resolution"] = {
                "followup_round": 1,
                "resolved_by_provider": False,
                "decision_reason": (
                    "Tras una ronda de follow-up, no se encontró una respuesta concluyente "
                    "o no se pudo aplicar el reanálisis. Se trata como incumplimiento para generar informe final."
                )
            }

            warnings.append({
                "type": "score_2_without_followup_update",
                "question_id": qid,
                "description": "No se encontró actualización de follow-up para una pregunta score=2. Se convirtió a score=1."
            })

        elif score == 1:
            final_ev["score"] = 1
            final_ev["score_type"] = "non_compliance"
            final_ev["generates_finding"] = True
            final_ev["requires_provider_followup"] = False
            final_ev["followup_questions"] = []

        elif score == 3:
            final_ev["score"] = 3
            final_ev["requires_provider_followup"] = False
            final_ev["requires_human_review"] = False
            final_ev["followup_questions"] = []

    final_evaluations.append(final_ev)

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# 3. Findings finales
# ------------------------------------------------------------

findings = []

for ev in final_evaluations:
    try:
        score = int(ev.get("score"))
    except Exception:
        score = None

    if score == 1 or ev.get("generates_finding") is True:
        findings.append(ev)

findings_by_level = defaultdict(list)

for finding in findings:
    level = finding.get("level") or "SIN NIVEL"
    findings_by_level[level].append(finding)

summary = {
    "total_evaluations": len(final_evaluations),
    "total_findings": len(findings),
    "critical_or_high": len(findings_by_level.get("ALTO", [])),
    "medium": len(findings_by_level.get("MEDIO", [])),
    "low": len(findings_by_level.get("BAJO", [])),
    "sin_nivel": len(findings_by_level.get("SIN NIVEL", [])),
    "resolved_by_followup": len([
        ev for ev in final_evaluations
        if ev.get("followup_resolution", {}).get("resolved_by_provider") is True
    ]),
    "not_resolved_by_followup": len([
        ev for ev in final_evaluations
        if ev.get("followup_resolution") and ev.get("followup_resolution", {}).get("resolved_by_provider") is False
    ])
}

scoring_final = {
    "case_id": case_id,
    "status": "FINAL_SCORING_DONE",
    "created_at": datetime.now().isoformat(timespec="seconds"),
    "total_evaluations": len(final_evaluations),
    "total_findings": len(findings),
    "summary": summary,
    "followup_updates_applied": sorted(list(updates.keys())),
    "reanalysis_files_read": reanalysis_files_read,
    "warnings": warnings,
    "question_evaluations": final_evaluations
}

risk_analysis = {
    "case_id": case_id,
    "status": "RISK_ANALYSIS_READY",
    "created_at": datetime.now().isoformat(timespec="seconds"),
    "summary": summary,
    "findings": findings,
    "findings_by_level": {
        level: values for level, values in findings_by_level.items()
    }
}

report_data = {
    "case_id": case_id,
    "status": "REPORT_DATA_READY",
    "created_at": datetime.now().isoformat(timespec="seconds"),
    "summary": summary,
    "findings": findings,
    "question_evaluations": final_evaluations,
    "metadata": {
        "source": "scoring_preliminary.json + followup_reanalysis_results",
        "followup_round": 1,
        "max_followup_rounds": 1,
        "followup_updates_applied": sorted(list(updates.keys())),
        "reanalysis_files_read": reanalysis_files_read
    }
}

scoring_final_path = analysis_dir / "scoring_final.json"
risk_analysis_path = analysis_dir / "risk_analysis.json"
report_data_path = analysis_dir / "report_data.json"
case_status_path = analysis_dir / "case_status.json"

write_json(scoring_final_path, scoring_final)
write_json(risk_analysis_path, risk_analysis)
write_json(report_data_path, report_data)

case_status = {
    "case_id": case_id,
    "status": "READY_FOR_REPORT",
    "updated_at": datetime.now().isoformat(timespec="seconds"),
    "followup_required": False,
    "followup_round": 1,
    "total_evaluations": len(final_evaluations),
    "total_findings": len(findings),
    "resolved_by_followup": summary["resolved_by_followup"],
    "not_resolved_by_followup": summary["not_resolved_by_followup"],
    "followup_updates_applied": sorted(list(updates.keys())),
    "reanalysis_files_read": reanalysis_files_read,
    "scoring_final_path": str(scoring_final_path),
    "risk_analysis_path": str(risk_analysis_path),
    "report_data_path": str(report_data_path),
    "warnings": warnings
}

write_json(case_status_path, case_status)

print(json.dumps({
    "case_id": case_id,
    "status": "READY_FOR_REPORT",
    "total_evaluations": len(final_evaluations),
    "total_findings": len(findings),
    "resolved_by_followup": summary["resolved_by_followup"],
    "not_resolved_by_followup": summary["not_resolved_by_followup"],
    "followup_updates_applied": sorted(list(updates.keys())),
    "reanalysis_files_read": reanalysis_files_read,
    "warnings_count": len(warnings),
    "scoring_final_path": str(scoring_final_path),
    "risk_analysis_path": str(risk_analysis_path),
    "report_data_path": str(report_data_path),
    "case_status_path": str(case_status_path)
}, ensure_ascii=False))
PY

=mkdir -p "/data/cases/{{$json.case_id}}/04_report" && printf '%s' '{{$json.report_narrative_b64}}' | base64 -d > "/data/cases/{{$json.case_id}}/04_report/report_narrative_ai.json" && python - <<'PY'
import json
from pathlib import Path
from datetime import datetime

case_id = "{{$json.case_id}}"

base = Path("/data/cases") / case_id
report_dir = base / "04_report"

pack_path = report_dir / "report_pack.json"
narrative_path = report_dir / "report_narrative_ai.json"
render_path = report_dir / "report_render_data.json"

if not pack_path.exists():
    raise Exception(f"No existe report_pack.json: {pack_path}")

if not narrative_path.exists():
    raise Exception(f"No existe report_narrative_ai.json: {narrative_path}")

pack = json.loads(pack_path.read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
narrative = json.loads(narrative_path.read_text(encoding="utf-8"))

render_data = {
    **pack,
    "narrative": narrative,
    "render_created_at": datetime.now().isoformat(timespec="seconds")
}

render_path.write_text(
    json.dumps(render_data, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2),
    encoding="utf-8"
)

print(json.dumps({
    "case_id": case_id,
    "status": "REPORT_RENDER_DATA_READY",
    "report_render_data_path": str(render_path),
    "report_pack_path": str(pack_path),
    "report_narrative_path": str(narrative_path)
}, ensure_ascii=False))
PY

=case_id="{{$json.case_id}}"
docx_path="{{$json.docx_path}}"

python3 - <<'PY'
import json
import re
from pathlib import Path
from datetime import datetime

case_id = """{{$json.case_id}}""".strip()
docx_path = """{{$json.docx_path}}""".strip()

if not case_id:
    raise Exception("case_id vacío para preparar subida a Google Drive.")

base = Path("/data/cases") / case_id
report_dir = base / "04_report"

report_render_data_path = report_dir / "report_render_data.json"
report_pack_path = report_dir / "report_pack.json"

def load_json(path):
    path = Path(path)
    if not path.exists():
        return {}
    return json.loads(path.read_text(encoding="utf-8"))

def clean_folder_name(value):
    text = str(value or "").strip()

    if not text:
        text = case_id

    text = re.sub(r'[\\/:*?"<>|]+', "_", text)
    text = re.sub(r"\s+", " ", text).strip()
    text = text.rstrip(". ")

    if len(text) > 100:
        text = text[:100].rstrip(". ")

    if not text:
        text = case_id

    return text

data = load_json(report_render_data_path)
pack = load_json(report_pack_path)

project_name = (
    data.get("cover", {}).get("proyecto")
    or data.get("project_context_input", {}).get("proyecto")
    or data.get("project_context", {}).get("proyecto")
    or pack.get("cover", {}).get("proyecto")
    or pack.get("project_context_input", {}).get("proyecto")
    or case_id
)

google_project_folder = clean_folder_name(project_name)

if not docx_path:
    report_out_dir = base / "05_report"
    candidates = sorted(
        report_out_dir.glob("Informe_Ciberseguridad_*.docx"),
        key=lambda p: p.stat().st_mtime,
        reverse=True
    )
    if candidates:
        docx_path = str(candidates[0])

docx = Path(docx_path)

if not docx.exists():
    raise Exception(f"No existe el informe DOCX: {docx}")

questionnaire_file = (
    data.get("sources", {}).get("questionnaire_file")
    or pack.get("sources", {}).get("questionnaire_file")
    or str(base / "01_originales" / "cuestionario.xlsx")
)

questionnaire = Path(questionnaire_file)

if not questionnaire.exists():
    raise Exception(f"No existe el cuestionario original: {questionnaire}")

upload_pack = {
    "case_id": case_id,
    "created_at": datetime.now().isoformat(timespec="seconds"),
    "google_drive_base_folder": "TFM",
    "google_drive_project_folder": google_project_folder,
    "google_drive_project_path": f"TFM/{google_project_folder}",
    "project_name": project_name,
    "files": [
        {
            "kind": "report",
            "file_path": str(docx),
            "file_name": docx.name,
            "mime_type": "application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.wordprocessingml.document"
        },
        {
            "kind": "questionnaire",
            "file_path": str(questionnaire),
            "file_name": questionnaire.name,
            "mime_type": "application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.spreadsheetml.sheet"
        }
    ]
}

out_path = report_dir / "google_drive_upload_pack.json"
out_path.write_text(
    json.dumps(upload_pack, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2),
    encoding="utf-8"
)

print(json.dumps({
    "case_id": case_id,
    "status": "GOOGLE_DRIVE_UPLOAD_PACK_READY",
    "google_drive_base_folder": upload_pack["google_drive_base_folder"],
    "google_drive_project_folder": upload_pack["google_drive_project_folder"],
    "google_drive_project_path": upload_pack["google_drive_project_path"],
    "project_name": project_name,
    "docx_path": str(docx),
    "questionnaire_path": str(questionnaire),
    "upload_pack_path": str(out_path),
    "files": upload_pack["files"]
}, ensure_ascii=False))
PY

parameters.toolDescription:
OBLIGATORIA. Recupera la ficha oficial del catálogo de riesgos para una pregunta concreta.

Debe usarse antes de evaluar o reanalizar cualquier pregunta.

Entrada esperada: string con formato:
EXACT_QUESTION_ID_Q_XXX Q_XXX texto de la pregunta

Devuelve la ficha oficial con metadata.question_id.
